overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered food stall area through waterfront promenades and under massive highway overpasses, showcasing the game's vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with dramatic lighting and detailed urban architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking past a purple-lit food stall, observing the vendor and counter items

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the counter inside the neon-lit stall

transparent glass and metal roof structure providing partial cover
red and blue arcade game machine with glowing screens
dark metal sliding door with ventilation slats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered market area with a prominent purple neon-lit food stall. The vendor stands behind the counter as the camera moves forward, passing arcade machines and metal stall structures under a glass roof.

events.description: exits covered food stall area into open sunlit street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk toward the waterfront promenade and elevated highway

notable_agents.action: green car driving past on the street

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with product display
massive red elevated highway structure with multiple levels
small food kiosk with yellow and red signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered stall area, the scene opens into a bright sunlit street. A green car passes by on the left while the camera approaches an elevated red highway overpass. A burrito stand and red vending machine mark the transition to the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with red pavement and benches

events.description: crossing the street at marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and continuing along the waterfront promenade with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the promenade toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: red paved walkway along the water with metal railings
bright red and blue benches lined along the waterfront
yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on the road
black and yellow striped posts lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade with distinctive red pavement and benches. The camera crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, moving with a group of pedestrians. The elevated highway overpass looms closer ahead while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with neon lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway under overpass with dramatic shift to purple and red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered walkway under the massive highway structure

entered.detail: concrete and steel tunnel formed by the highway overpass above
vending machine illuminated with bright purple neon lighting
large vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
silver metal wire fence along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath the massive highway overpass, where natural light gives way to dramatic purple and red neon illumination. Vending machines and digital advertising screens line the right side as the camera moves through the concrete corridor toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with casino and palm trees

events.description: exiting covered walkway back into open sunlit street with casino building

agents.ego_description: walking along the open commercial street toward the distant skyscrapers, passing the casino

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large commercial building with neon signage and colorful facade
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
wide urban street with traffic lanes and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit commercial street dominated by Lizzy's casino building on the left with its colorful neon signage. Palm trees line the sidewalk as the camera continues forward toward the futuristic skyscraper skyline, with the elevated highway now receding behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit market into a bright, expansive urban waterfront. It begins within a semi-covered area, gliding past arcade machines and a purple neon-lit food stall under a glass roof. As the camera exits the stalls, the environment shifts abruptly into a sunlit street where a green car passes by and a red vending machine marks the transition toward the coast. The scene then opens onto a waterfront promenade with distinctive red pavement, moving through a crowd of pedestrians at a marked crosswalk. Finally, the camera advances toward a looming red highway overpass as futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance under the clear sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit underpass into a bright, expansive futuristic city street. It begins within a covered concrete walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, where natural light is replaced by dramatic purple and red neon illumination from vending machines and digital screens. As the camera moves forward through this corridor, the enclosed space gradually opens up toward a distant exit. The scene then shifts into the brilliance of a sunlit commercial street, passing the colorful neon signage of Lizzy's casino and palm trees lining the sidewalk. Finally, the view expands toward a towering skyscraper skyline as the elevated highway recedes into the background.
